heading: Quality Management Systems
body: International standard for Quality Management Systems (QMS), ensuring we consistently provide products that meet customer and regulatory requirements. This certification demonstrates our commitment to continuous improvement and customer satisfaction.

heading: Environmental Management Systems
body: International standard for Environmental Management Systems (EMS), providing a framework to manage our environmental responsibilities systematically and sustainably. We are committed to reducing our environmental footprint across both plants.

heading: Occupational Health & Safety
body: International standard for Occupational Health and Safety Management Systems (OHSMS), helping KBI provide a safe and healthy workplace by preventing work-related injuries and illnesses while continuously improving our OH&S performance.
